name: ai-companion
title: AI Companion
author: lveillard
description: AI companions with 86 RCON commands. Pathfinding nav. Blueprint construction. Logistics (haul/refuel). Combat crew (patrol/nest-clear/repair). Orchestration: task-board reservations, standing roles (guard/refuel/maintain), self-driving plans as a dependency DAG (auto-execute structured mine/craft/build/haul/research steps in parallel across the crew, nearest-worker allocation, supply-chain handoffs). Pillar I autonomous-colony: factory doctor (analyze/graph/auto-fix bottlenecks: places + powers + fuels the machine) + recipe/tech dependency planning + production-ratio planner. Pillar III buddy memory: persistent named locations/preferences/notes the companion remembers across saves (recall/forget/goto). Unified status. Hybrid mining. FLE-inspired queues. Factorio 2.x compatible.
